description: Detection regression corpus (TECH-C6). Each trace replays a recorded scenario through PromotionEngine + MicGate.decide and asserts the produced verdict sequence matches the captured expectation, so a regression in PromotionEngine / MicGate is caught by CI. The first nine entries are synthetic seeds that lock in the format and cross-app scenarios; the teams_native_{rewalk,debounce,flicker}_end entries are real dogfood sessions derived from the daemon event log via scripts/extract_detection_trace.py (verdict sequence, leading signal, confirmed_by, flicker count and timing preserved; titles and pids redacted).
